caption: A man with a distinctive, voluminous grey hairstyle, wearing glasses, a white shirt with tan suspenders, and a bowtie, is seated in a studio environment. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of shelves containing various items, including clothing and framed photographs. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and one on the right reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text below it. Throughout the sequence, the man is expressive; he begins by raising his hand to his head with a thoughtful or stressed expression, then looks downward and slightly to the side, and finally continues gesturing toward his head while looking down. The setting and the man's attire remain constant as his facial expressions and hand movements shift.
